# ListHQ

> Australia's AI-powered real estate platform for agents, buyers, renters, and investors.

ListHQ is a two-sided property marketplace built for the Australian market. It combines traditional property search with AI tools including voice search, seller likelihood scoring, buyer concierge matching, and AI-generated offer letters.

## For Agents
- List properties (sale and rental) with AI-generated descriptions in 12+ languages
- Access seller likelihood scores to identify motivated vendors
- Manage rent rolls, trust accounting, and arrears chasing
- Network with other agents to share off-market listings
- E-signature document workflows
- Commission calculator and CRM built-in

## For Buyers & Renters
- Search properties by suburb, price, bedrooms across Australia
- Voice search powered by Deepgram and Gemini AI
- Save searches and receive instant alerts for new listings
- Pre-approval integration with mortgage brokers
- View open homes and book inspections online

## For Investors
- Off-market property access through agent network
- Rental yield data and suburb performance metrics
- Trust accounting transparency for landlords

- [Home](https://listhq.com.au/)
- [Buy Property](https://listhq.com.au/buy)
- [Rent Property](https://listhq.com.au/rent)
- [Find an Agent](https://listhq.com.au/agents)
- [Browse Suburbs](https://listhq.com.au/suburbs)
- [For Agents](https://listhq.com.au/for-agents)
- [Stamp Duty Calculator](https://listhq.com.au/stamp-duty-calculator)
- [Help Centre](https://listhq.com.au/help)

## Company
- Founded: 2025
- Headquarters: Australia
- Website: https://listhq.com.au
- Coverage: All Australian states and territories
